purpose: Production promotion registry for recommendation configs. Research configs are not production inputs unless an entry is added here after the full promotion gate passes.

production_policy.daily_recommendation_rule: Daily recommendation must use only configs recorded in promoted_configs.
production_policy.monthly_selection_rule: Monthly selection must use only configs recorded in promoted_configs.

current_state.decision: Monthly selection default promoted on 2026-04-30: U1_liquid_tradable + Top20 + indcap3 hard-cap baseline.
current_state.default_action: Use the active promoted config for monthly selection; do not write any other unpromoted research result into config.yaml.example or local production config.yaml.

research_candidate_status.evidence: P1/G0 label-neighborhood tuning failed daily-proxy-first and mechanism gates.
R1F fixed rerun confirms UPSIDE_C_FIXED and DUAL_V1_FIXED remain reject.
R2B v1 replacement candidates did not outperform BASELINE_S2_FIXED after costs and diagnostics.
Daily proxy was only +0.25pct versus baseline; Day 8 audit found pair_edge_score buckets reversed and replace-1 sensitivity weaker than baseline.
Daily proxy, strong-down defense, and switch quality were weaker than U3_A.
Strong-up switch diagnostics improved, but daily proxy remained below BASELINE_S2_FIXED.
Owner decision on 2026-04-30 promotes U1_liquid_tradable + Top20 + M8_regime_aware_fixed_policy__indcap3 hard-cap baseline as the monthly selection default.

promoted_configs.owner_decision: User approved promotion on 2026-04-30: project default method is U1_liquid_tradable + Top20 + indcap3 hard-cap baseline.
